name: mcp-memory-service
description: Hybrid memory service combining vector search, knowledge graph, and BM25 with optional Cloudflare cloud sync.
tagline: Knowledge graph memory with optional cloud sync
approachDetail: Vector embeddings (MiniLM-L6-v2 via ONNX) + knowledge graph with typed relations + BM25 keyword search
searchDetail: Vector semantic search + BM25 keyword + knowledge graph expansion with typed relations
storageDetail: SQLite-vec for vectors, optional Cloudflare Workers + Vectorize for cloud sync
mcpDetail: MCP server + REST API, works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen
scopesDetail: Automatic agent-ID tagging via X-Agent-ID header for per-agent memory scoping
duplicateDetail: Semantic dedup with conversation_id bypass for incremental saves
multiUserDetail: Team collaboration via optional Cloudflare backend
crossMachineDetail: Local-first with optional Cloudflare cloud sync for cross-machine access
webUiDetail: 8-tab dashboard at localhost:8000 — search, browse, documents, analytics, quality scoring, D3.js knowledge graph visualization
contextInjectionDetail: Agent calls MCP tools or REST API to search and retrieve memories
networkDetail: Local-first with optional Cloudflare Workers cloud sync
